name: N-able N-sight RMM
description: Monitor N-able N-sight remote monitoring and management platform for device compliance, monitoring alerts, and endpoint inventory

credentialFields.helpText: API key from N-sight RMM Dashboard > Account Settings > API Access

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
